name: Praline Candy
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the sugars, half-and-half, and butter in a saucepan.
2. Bring to a soft ball stage using a candy thermometer or by testing with a little water (it should form a pliable ball when dropped into cold water).
3. Remove from heat and let cool slightly.
4. Beat in the pecans and vanilla until well combined.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto waxed paper to cool.
6. Makes 14 to 15 pralines.
